---
name: Chore
about: Maintenance, tooling, or non-feature work
title: "chore: "
labels: chore
---

## Description
What needs to be maintained, updated, or cleaned up?

## Context
Why is this needed? (e.g. outdated deps, config drift, tech debt)

## Proposed action
What exactly should be done?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task is completed as described
- [ ] No functional behavior is broken
- [ ] Tests/build still pass

## Notes
Any extra details, links, or constraints
